TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1284.090-1317.750] interviewee: take care of medications, bring medications from Katowice to Auschwitz. You mean the City of Auschwitz.
[1317.750-1370.660] interviewee: To the City of Auschwitz, yeah. But I said, it's a border. I cannot cross the border between Silesia and the Galicia at Auschwitz was a border. And he said, you go to the commandant in Auschwitz. And you tell him what you want. I go up to office. And adjutant, a high officer comes, what do I want? I said, I want to talk to the commandant.
